who: HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll discrepancies cause incorrect employee payments. We provide real-time monitoring instead of manual payroll audits and error checks.
problem: Payroll discrepancies leading to incorrect employee payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations help
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR operations teams with demo video
Community groups sharing payroll management tools
try_it: Let users try real-time monitoring on 1-3 payrolls
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Share weekly progress updates in communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common payroll setups as templates
Set default reminders for payroll tasks
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
Enable one-click export of payroll reports
Streamline the onboarding process for new users
